tagline: South Fulton's elegant, all-inclusive event hall — where celebrations become unforgettable.

services.title: Banquet & Event Hall Rental
services.desc: Spacious, adaptable hall for weddings, birthdays, corporate seminars, and private celebrations of every size, with ample on-site parking.

services.title: Chair & Throne Rentals
services.desc: Chivalry chairs (from $6 on-site) and statement throne chairs ($150-$250) to elevate any event's decor and seating.

services.title: Mobile Photo Booth & Delivery
services.desc: Mobile photo booth unit with instant digital delivery, plus delivery service for rentals across the South Fulton area.

reviews.quote: My mom just had her 60th birthday party a couple days ago — everything was amazing and beautiful.
reviews.author: Sherrell Sabb

reviews.quote: Ms. Sandy was patient and eager to assist. This is my second time using this event space and they NEVER disappoint.
reviews.author: Caprice Clarke

reviews.quote: This place is amazing. We had my daughter's sweet 16 party and she loved everything. The decor was to the T.
reviews.author: Regina Rosser
